title: Citizenship is coming to Geoconflict
body: The next update introduces citizenship for committed players. Keep playing now to be ready for launch, and watch this panel for the full rollout details.

title: Faster joins are live
body: Background terrain preloading is now live. Match joins should feel more consistent, especially on slower devices and long public-lobby sessions.

title: Feedback is now in the game
body: You can now send bug reports and suggestions directly from the UI. Include what happened and we will use it to prioritize fixes.
